chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4117 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.16918/2025 3. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Ahmed Masood, advocates for petitioner Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ghulam Nabi Shah, D.C. IR, CTO Zone-II Karachi Mr. Niaz Ahmed, AC, IR, CTO, Zone-II, Karachi Learned counsel for the respondent placed statement on record along with copies of order of blacklisting. The order has been supplied to the learned counsel for the petitioner today and counsel for respondent states that the petitioner remains at liberty to file an appeal there against before the statutory hierarchy. In view of the statement, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall now file an appeal and seek remedy before the statutory forum, therefore, this petition may be disposed of as having served its purpose. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
